hero.bio: I develop agile, clean and user-focused web experiences. Passionate about quality interfaces and the details that make the difference.

about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a Frontend Developer based in Valencia with professional experience building websites for marketplaces. I'm passionate about creating fast, clean interfaces focused on the user.
about.p2: I mainly work with React and Next.js, with experience in Angular as well. On the styling side I use Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap, and Vite as my build tool of choice on modern projects.
about.p3: I hold a Higher Degree in Web Application Development and a Master's in 3D Art from my time in the video game industry. That background gave me a creative eye for design and user experience that I bring directly into every interface I build.
about.skill_hint: Grab an icon and drag it over the text

projects.title: Featured
projects.drag_hint: Grab the cards and arrange them however you like

contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.title: Get in
contact.info_text: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.

1.title: VP

features: Customer area to browse and track orders

education.title: Vocational Degree — TSMR
education.description: Computer systems, networking and hardware fundamentals. A solid technical foundation covering infrastructure and systems administration.

education.title: Higher Degree — 3D Animation
education.description: 3D animation and interactive environments. First steps in creating digital content for video games and interactive media.

education.title: Master's in 3D Art
education.description: 3D art for video games: character and environment modelling, texturing with Substance Painter, and production pipelines for the industry.

education.title: Higher Degree — Web Development (DAW)
education.description: Web Application Development. Transition to frontend development, cementing the technical foundations I apply today as a developer.

work.title: Grupo Ceremón
work.description: VR experiences with Unreal Engine and AR with Vuforia. 3D asset modelling in Maya optimised for real-time rendering.

work.title: Polygonal Mind
work.description: 3D environment and asset creation with Maya, ZBrush and Substance Painter. Unity integration with LODs and direct management of international clients.

work.title: StartGo Connection
work.description: Markup and development of corporate websites with HTML, CSS and vanilla JavaScript. WordPress site building and theme/plugin customisation.

work.title: Conmuta Soluciones
work.description: Frontend of a marketplace e-commerce platform with React, Next.js and TypeScript. Responsive layouts with Tailwind CSS and SSR/SSG per page requirements.
